_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Verify and update security documentation reflecting the application/system security design features.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.474), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.438).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.552). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. DCWF-only terms [application, design, features, reflecting, security, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, develop, escalation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.889, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Verify and update security documentation reflecting the application/system secur" and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 < STS 0.552 (gap -0.064). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [application, design, features] and [articles, base, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. DCWF-only: [application, design, features, reflecting, security, system]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, data, develop, escalation, knowledge].
